creator: m.viey@wanadoo.fr
text:
Hi,

since the last update this port seems broken on my system. The interface doesn't display correctly anymore, no cursor, no graphical element just text.

I have tried to reset configuration as it seems some changes are made in dependencies. This doesn't fix the problem and I have warnings at startup:

$ cmus
cmus: Error: no such option input.flac.priority
cmus: Error: no such option input.mp4.priority
cmus: Error: no such option input.opus.priority
cmus: Error: no such option input.vorbis.priority
cmus: Error: no such option input.wav.priority
cmus: Error: no such option mixer.pulse.restore_volume
cmus: Error: an error occured while initializing MPRIS: No such file or directory. MPRIS will be disabled.
cmus: Press <enter> to continue. 



MPRIS never worked and I had disabled it. But ffmpeg, flac, puseaudio are installed. Sound is ok. But interface is unusable.

Have an idea about how I can, fix this ?
